positive: A maximalist, symmetrical geometric celestial landscape, featuring a deep indigo nebula background, interspersed with glowing, stylized constellations made of gold wire and iridescent crystalline structures. The main subject is a central, stylized crescent moon surrounded by three orbiting geometric planets of varied pastel tones (mint, coral, lilac), all rendered in clean, thick line art with solid color fills. Incorporate abstract cosmic dust trails and minimalist celestial motifs (stars, comets, zodiac signs) arranged symmetrically around the central axis. Style: Art Deco meets modern vector illustration. Composition: Highly detailed, centered, and visually balanced. Lighting: Dramatic, emanating only from the celestial objects themselves. Color palette: Deep blues, violets, golds, and complementary pastels. Perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, low resolution, grain, noise, artifact, watermark, text, logo, signature, cropped, messy, asymmetrical, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic, photorealistic
